description_long: This object is a modern military jet fighter with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and sharply swept-back wings. The aircraft features a pointed nose cone, a bubble canopy cockpit positioned near the front, and twin vertical stabilizers at the rear. The wings are mid-mounted with pronounced leading-edge extensions and are equipped with underwing pylons for external stores. The jet intakes are located along the fuselage sides, and the rear houses a single large exhaust nozzle. The surface is finished in a camouflage pattern with shades of gray, blue, and some yellow accents, and the overall design emphasizes speed and maneuverability.
description: A modern jet fighter with swept-back mid-mounted wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a bubble canopy cockpit, finished in a gray-blue camouflage pattern.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, bubble canopy, and the full span of the swept-back wings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, cockpit placement, and the vertical stabilizers at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin vertical stabilizers, large exhaust nozzle, and the trailing edges of the wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the wing and tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept-back wings and pronounced leading-edge extensions; no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine with a large exhaust nozzle.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers at the rear.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear; main and nose gear units are implied but not visibly extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed bubble canopy cockpit, likely single-seat based on size and shape.
